Name: Jasper PCT Events
Description: Pictomancer public event profile for normal-duty play. It supports Addle and Tempera Coat, repairs palette/muse/motif helper states, releases standard AoE on packs, and leaves ForceAOE to the player. Lineage note: Arche supplied the general reaction groundwork and coverage; Jasper reshapes it here for public-duty safety, job controls, and xSalice compatibility.

Events.Name: Addle & Tempera Coat
Events.Description: Pairs Addle with job mitigation for raidwide damage.

Events.Name: Out-of-Combat Reset
Events.Description: Returns Pictomancer ACR toggles to their standard out-of-combat state.

Events.Name: Zone Reset
Events.Description: Pictomancer defaults are reapplied after changing zones.

Events.Name: Wipe Reset
Events.Description: Pictomancer defaults are reapplied after a wipe.

Events.Name: Addle Tankbuster
Events.Description: Applies Addle to tankbusters when the target is not already covered.

Events.Name: Tempera Coat Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Tempera Coat around 75 percent HP for earlier personal safety outside scripted raidwide handling.

Events.Name: Damage State Guard
Events.Description: Maintains Pictomancer AoE, palette, muse, motif, movement, and shield helper toggles in combat so imported or held toggle states cannot strand the job in a passive state.

Events.Name: Pack Damage Release
Events.Description: Maintains standard Pictomancer AoE, palette, muse, motif, and movement helper toggles on 2+ enemy pulls while leaving ForceAOE manual.

Conditions.Name: Target No Addle
Conditions.Description: Target does not already have Addle or equivalent magic damage down.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 75%
Conditions.Description: Self HP safety threshold for personal mitigation.

Logics.Name: Addle & Tempera Coat
Logics.Description: Magic raidwide mitigation without a single-target enemy-count gate.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Returns Pictomancer ACR settings to their normal out-of-combat state, including AoE, palette, muse, shield, and movement helper toggles. ForceAOE remains manual.

Logics.Name: Addle TB
Logics.Description: Applies Addle to tankbusters when the target is not already covered.

Logics.Name: Tempera Coat Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Tempera Coat around 75 percent HP for earlier personal safety outside scripted raidwide handling.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Maintains Pictomancer AoE, palette, muse, motif, movement, and shield helper toggles in combat so imported or held toggle states cannot strand the job in a passive state.

Logics.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Logics.Description: Maintains standard Pictomancer AoE, palette, muse, motif, and movement helper toggles on 2+ enemy pulls while leaving ForceAOE manual.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Starry Muse and Motifs near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Starry Muse and Motifs near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Mitigate
Items.Description: Uses Addle for raidwide/tankbuster support and Tempera Coat for personal shielding.
